name: Golf Lounge 18
about: Golf Lounge 18 is an indoor golf facility featuring TrackMan 4 technology simulator bays. The venue provides a social environment with a full bar, multiple HDTVs for sports viewing, and a focus on both play and private lessons. Membership options are available with various packages offering discounts on bay rates, and the facility hosts leagues, corporate events, and parties. The service model includes hourly bay reservations that can be split amongst groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 Dual Radar Technology for accurate shot tracking
Access to over 450 world-famous golf courses to play on
Full bar and sports TVs create a social sports bar atmosphere
PGA Certified Golf Instructors available for lessons at all skill levels
Flexible hourly bay pricing suitable for individuals and groups

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food menu available with an expanded menu for socializing

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar Technology trusted by hundreds of pros

faq.answer: The information provided does not specify if club rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site food menu and full bar, making external food and drink unnecessary.

faq.answer: The content does not specify an average time for playing 18 holes.

faq.answer: Yes, they offer a Junior Academy and after-school membership for juniors, indicating a kid-friendly environment.
